name: Trustero
description: Trustero — AI-powered compliance automation platform mapping evidence to security frameworks like SOC 2 and ISO 27001.

when_to_use: Automating evidence collection for SOC 2 and ISO 27001 audits
Building continuous compliance monitoring for SaaS companies
Reducing manual audit prep time with AI-assisted compliance
Connecting security controls to compliance frameworks automatically

pros: AI pulls evidence from source systems
review.verdict: Reasonable compliance automation entrant, but Vanta and Drata remain the default for most buyers.
review.best_for: Startups needing basic SOC 2 and ISO automation at a lower price point
review.not_for: Teams already standardized on Vanta, Drata or Secureframe

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: custom pricing alone is not HWM evidence
